results.title: Know why people choose to turn off their application notification
results.description: Sick of all the dings and buzzes from your phone every day? There are more and more people turning off the notification switch on their app of choice, here’s why: Save your concentration How many times have you been at your desk or studying when one little alert pulled you away? Some people get close [...] The post Know why people choose to turn off their application notification appeared first on KalingaTV .
